_backup_note: Backup of the NEW isolated workflow 'SyncView Workload — Reconcile' (id lGwC9WWPVJtxphtf), created 2026-06-17 for Phase 1a of the event-driven Workload. Schedule (10 min) -> GET /webhook/linear-issues -> bulk upsert into Supabase workload_issues -> soft-deactivate rows that left the active set. Touches NO existing workflow; writes ONLY workload_issues. No secrets embedded (Supabase auth is the existing 'Supabase - SyncView Calendar' supabaseApi credential, referenced by predefined type; URLs are public). Safety: empty/failed read returns [] so the upsert+deactivate never run (no mass-deactivation); deactivation is a soft active=false flip (never deletes) and self-heals next run. To disable: deactivate the workflow in n8n (no rollback target needed — it is net-new).
name: SyncView Workload — Reconcile

nodes.name: Bulk Upsert workload_issues
nodes._credentials: supabaseApi: 'Supabase - SyncView Calendar' (id XdBpJ6Xk8PMpZXXT) — bound in n8n UI

nodes.name: Deactivate Stale Rows
nodes._credentials: supabaseApi: 'Supabase - SyncView Calendar' (id XdBpJ6Xk8PMpZXXT) — bound in n8n UI
